hero.title: Understand Your Impact.
hero.subtitle: Carbon footprinting isn't just a buzzword. It's the first step toward a sustainable future. Explore how daily habits shape the world around us.

education.description: The average annual carbon footprint per person in developed nations. To reverse climate change, the global average must drop to 2,000 kg by 2050.

tips.title: Rethink Commuting
tips.copy: Switching to public transit or carpooling just twice a week can reduce your transport emissions by 30%.

tips.title: Optimize Energy
tips.copy: Phantom power drains electricity. Unplugging inactive devices and switching to LED bulbs significantly lowers your monthly footprint.

tips.title: Dietary Shifts
tips.copy: Replacing red meat with plant-based alternatives for just one meal a day saves thousands of gallons of water and cuts methane emissions.
